hero.leftDesc: Performance marketing driving brand growth through creative campaigns.
hero.rightDesc: Data-driven decisions backed by deep analytics and performance tracking.

about.label: About Me
about.heading:
Turning clicks into
customers.
about.para1: I'm a digital marketing strategist with 5+ years of experience helping businesses grow their online presence, generate leads, and scale revenue. I combine creative thinking with analytical rigor to deliver campaigns that perform.
about.para2: Whether it's architecting a paid media funnel, building an organic content engine, or running A/B tests to squeeze out every percentage point of conversion — I'm obsessed with results that move the needle.

cards.title: Growth Strategy
cards.desc: Full-funnel marketing strategies built for sustainable, scalable growth.

cards.title: Paid Advertising
cards.desc: Google, Meta, TikTok — precision targeting that maximizes every dollar.

cards.title: Content Marketing
cards.desc: Content that ranks, resonates, and converts — at every stage of the funnel.

cards.title: Data & Analytics
cards.desc: Every decision backed by data. GA4, Looker Studio, A/B testing.

cta.label: Ready to grow?
cta.heading: Let's build something great.
cta.body: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Let's talk strategy, goals, and how I can help grow your brand.
